rationale: Educ. Code §28.058 governs confidentiality of individual student information received by the commissioner. It bears no relation to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: All information regarding an individual student received by the commissioner under this subchapter from a school district or student is confidential under Chapter 552, Government Code.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and student confidentiality provision.
